spec_match.rationale: Absolutely superb. Includes comprehensive programmatic parse checks for standard CSSContain Level 3 syntax and accurately shows side-by-side comparisons of native rules vs. fallback configurations.

interactive.rationale: Dynamic range resizers for both columns with clear active match badges, along with easy code copy blocks.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes excellent capability tests and details the standard fallback strategy explicitly.

references.rationale: Correct relative breadcrumb navigation back to feature root.

design_system.rationale: Clean grids, high-contrast badge markers (supported/unsupported), and robust spacing.

summary: The definitive gold standard compatibility check tool for container queries, housing five programmatic probes alongside interactive side-by-side comparative adapters.
